nasb.text: Then the Lord said to Moses, “Go to Pharaoh and speak to him, ‘Thus says the Lord, the God of the Hebrews, “Let My people go, that they may serve Me.

esv.text: Then the Lord said to Moses, “Go in to Pharaoh and say to him, ‘Thus says the Lord, the God of the Hebrews, “Let my people go, that they may serve me.

cnv.text: 耶和華對摩西說：“你要到法老那裡去，對他說：‘耶和華希伯來人的　神這樣說：“讓我的人民離開這裡，使他們可以事奉我。”

ccb.text: 耶和华对摩西说：“你再进宫见法老，告诉他，‘希伯来人的上帝耶和华说，让我的子民去事奉我。
